raw_consumer_statement:
I lost my credit card issued by Barclay Priceline with number ending in XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX and immediately reported to the company on XX/XX/XXXX. The company closed my old card, removed the 3 fraudulent transactions and issued me a new card in mail. 

In XXXX, those 3 fraudulent transactions were reposted on my account and I called around XX/XX/XXXX to inquire. One representative told me the fraud case had not been carried over to the new card, so she issued me a new card again. After waiting for a week, I received the new card in mail, but the 3 fraudulent transactions still remain on my new card. 
So I called the merchant again on XX/XX/year>. Then I found out that they closed the investigation claiming that one of the unauthorized transaction was with the same merchant I done business before, so the company concluded the fraudulent transaction is valid and require me to pay. 

I attached the XXXX statement with those three reposted fraudulent transactions, more information is available if needed.
